name: iq-series
desc: The IQ Series is a hands-on learning experience for Microsoft IQ: Microsoft's unified intelligence layer for the enterprise, spanning Foundry IQ, Work IQ, and …
descFull: The IQ Series is a hands-on learning experience for Microsoft IQ: Microsoft's unified intelligence layer for the enterprise, spanning Foundry IQ, Work IQ, and Fabric IQ. The series includes video episodes, Jupyter notebooks, and Azure deployment templates.
